description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a website chatbot named 'Website Lead Assistant' on the active live website channel that only targets visitors in the United States, greets them with a custom message asking for full name, company, and work email as required fields, then asks for an estimated monthly budget and routes conversations with budgets over $5,000 to the inbox used for pricing and demo requests, with weekday business hours in the New York time zone, a standard offline message, and behavior limited to new visitors who won't see it again for 30 days.

target_names: Route high-budget website leads to Sales

bot.name: Website Lead Assistant
bot.greeting_message: Hi! Im your virtual assistant. I can help with pricing and demos. First, whats your full name, company, and work email?

high_budget_routing_automation.name: Route high-budget website leads to Sales

offline_message_template.content: Were offline right now, but leave your details and well get back to you.

tasks.name: Create a website chatbot named 'Website Lead Assistant' on the active live website channel that only targets visitors in the United States, greets them with a custom message asking for full name, company, and work email as required fields, then asks for an estimated monthly budget and routes conversations with budgets over $5,000 to the inbox used for pricing and demo requests, with weekday business hours in the New York time zone, a standard offline message, and behavior limited to new visitors who won't see it again for 30 days.

tasks.instruction: Set up an automation rule for new email conversations tagged as urgent that waits no more than 10 minutes, then uses an AI-based urgent acknowledgement email template to send an automatic reply from the shared support address with a subject line starting with an '[URGENT]' tag and including the ticket ID placeholder, and a body that references the customer's first name and ticket ID, sending without human review.

generate_ai_reply_action.body_template: Hi {{customer_first_name}}, weve logged your urgent request (Ticket {{ticket_id}}). Our team will respond shortly.

tasks.name: Set up an automation rule for new email conversations tagged as urgent that waits no more than 10 minutes, then uses an AI-based urgent acknowledgement email template to send an automatic reply from the shared support address with a subject line starting with an '[URGENT]' tag and including the ticket ID placeholder, and a body that references the customer's first name and ticket ID, sending without human review.

tasks.instruction: Create a routing rule that, on the first customer message only, assigns any conversation whose text mentions pricing-related keywords (such as 'price', 'pricing', or 'quote') to the inbox used for pricing and demo requests with normal priority, and assigns any conversation mentioning technical issue keywords (such as 'bug', 'error', or 'not working') to the inbox used for technical support with high priority, keeping the rule always on and scoped globally.

sales_inbox.description: Inbox for pricing, quotes, and demo requests

support_inbox.description: Inbox for technical issues and customer support

tasks.name: Create a routing rule that, on the first customer message only, assigns any conversation whose text mentions pricing-related keywords (such as 'price', 'pricing', or 'quote') to the inbox used for pricing and demo requests with normal priority, and assigns any conversation mentioning technical issue keywords (such as 'bug', 'error', or 'not working') to the inbox used for technical support with high priority, keeping the rule always on and scoped globally.

tasks.instruction: Build and save an AI performance analytics report titled 'AI Resolution - 30 days' that shows AI resolution rate grouped by channel over the last 30 days, filters to conversations where AI handled at least 80% of messages, sorts channels by the number of AI-resolved conversations in descending order, and pins the report to the main dashboard.

report.name: AI Resolution - 30 days
report.description: AI resolution rate by channel over the last 30 days for conversations where AI handled at least 80% of messages.

tasks.instruction: Connect the CRM sandbox integration (not the legacy analytics integration) using the provided test API key, choose the sandbox environment, enable automatic syncing/creation of contacts from new conversations, and map the platform's customer email, full name, and company fields to the CRM's contact email, contact name, and account name fields respectively.

tasks.instruction: Create three public FAQ articles in the main public knowledge base whose titles include the keywords 'pricing', 'trial', and 'support hours' respectively, then enable that knowledge base to be used as the preferred source for AI-generated chat answers (before conversation history) for bots.

target_names: How to start a free trial
Our support hours and response times

tasks.instruction: Add a new user with the Agent role using the email 'alex.support@example.test' who is assigned only to the inbox used for technical support, has access restricted to assigned inboxes rather than all conversations, and has custom working hours set to Monday–Friday from 08:00 to 16:00 in the New York time zone.

tasks.instruction: From the annual billing plans, select the cheapest plan that costs under $400 per month, includes AI assistant features, and provides at least 5 seats, then start its trial by completing the signup form with company name 'Example AI Customer Co', company size '51–100 employees', work email 'owner@example.test', job title 'Owner', and AI features enabled.
